status_definitions.label: Unconditional
status_definitions.description: The suite treats this as theorem-level without additional standing input.

status_definitions.label: Conditional (K0 = 7)
status_definitions.description: Licensed once the K0 = 7 route is granted.

status_definitions.label: Conditional (K0 = 7, KPO-3)
status_definitions.description: Licensed only with the named bridge stack visible.

status_definitions.label: Computational / governance
status_definitions.description: Supports certification, routing, or evidence discipline but does not by itself promote a theorem.
